title: Add a hard sanity gate for obviously irrational near-zero and near-one entries
subsystem: entry gates / price sanity / risk containment
objective: Add a distinct hard sanity gate that blocks obviously irrational near-zero and near-one entries, separate from the broader near-resolution audit.

context.problem: Near-zero and near-one market entries need explicit handling. A simple min entry price floor is not enough because extreme prices can still represent irrational trades in either direction depending on side and market state.

required_work: 1. Add a narrow hard sanity gate for extreme price regions near zero and near one.
2. Keep this gate distinct from broader near-resolution analysis and from the simple MIN_ENTRY_PRICE floor.
3. Make thresholds explicit and configurable if a new env knob is required.
4. Log rejections in the standard gate format.
acceptance_criteria: Extreme irrational entry regions are blocked by a dedicated gate
Gate is distinct from broader near-resolution audit logic
No files outside allowed scope modified
python -m py_compile bot_core.py passes if modified
verification: Show exact gate placement in the entry sequence
Run py_compile on every changed file
rollback: Revert only the files listed in allowed_files if they were changed for this task.
restart_note: Restart required for live entry gating to use the new sanity gate.
